title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Birlasoft International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Birlasoft International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
